phase_name: v0 launch — 4 parallel sub-phases (engine + Python+bench + TS+Go + docs site)

completed_tasks.name: Phase 13.0 design contract + spec docs CLOSED 2026-05-03 PASS
Capture Phase 13.7.5 pre-OSS polish (comment audit + test coverage) idea doc + ROADMAP entry
Phase 13.4 engine — interactive discuss-phase (4 user-locked decisions: strict diff matrix, pure in-RAM persistence, OP_RESET full-clear gated on test_mode 3-ways-settable, surgical allowlist permit)

Phase 13.5 Python SDK + bench CLI — interactive discuss-phase (4 user-locked decisions: mypy --strict + Any escapes, in-package demos ~3MB, subcommand+long-form CLI, flat module structure) + fsync bench mode amendment + cross-amendment from 13.4 D-03 (bv.App test_mode kwarg)

Phase 13.6 TS+Go — interactive discuss-phase (4 user-locked decisions: ESM-only TS, github.com/beava-dev/beava monorepo with sdk/go subdir, single-Python-orchestrator cross-SDK conformance, doc patches in 13.6 closure) + MAJOR SCOPE CHANGE: pipeline DSL Python-only; TS+Go are communicate-only (~600 LOC each, down from ~1800)

Phase 13.7 docs site — interactive discuss-phase (4 user-locked decisions: integrate into existing beava-website + Pagefind NOT MkDocs spin-up, use existing beava-design-system tokens, vertical guides DEFERRED to user-authored interactive follow-up, Cloudflare Pages deploy)

remaining_tasks.name: /gsd-plan-phase 13.4 — break engine prep into ~8-10 plans across 3 waves
remaining_tasks.rationale: Engine prereq; 13.5/6/7 integration tests gate on this

remaining_tasks.name: /gsd-plan-phase 13.5 — Python SDK rewrite + beava bench CLI plans (~10-12 plans)

Execute 4 phases — 13.4 first then 13.5/6/7 in parallel via /gsd-manager terminals

human_actions_pending.action: Decide if `tally` repo should be renamed to `beava` for v0 launch (Phase 13.8 territory; not blocking 13.4-13.7 plan-phase)
human_actions_pending.context: Per Phase 13.6 D-02, monorepo path is github.com/beava-dev/beava — current repo codename is `tally`

human_actions_pending.action: Verify `beava-dev` GitHub org exists or create it before Phase 13.8 GA tag
human_actions_pending.context: Per Phase 13.6 D-02, Go module + npm publish target this org

decisions.decision: Phase 13.0 design contract complete — 16 plans landed across 3 waves; all 4 D-XX + 7 Q-XX honored; 158 artifacts (54 op pages + sdk-api + pipeline-dsl + concepts + architecture + ADR-001/002/003 + 68 tests + 9 demos + wire fixtures)
Phase 13.6 RESCOPED to communicate-only SDKs (~600 LOC each, down from ~1800)
decisions.rationale: User directive: pipeline DSL is Python-only; TS+Go just push events + query features

decisions.decision: Phase 13.7 RESCOPED to integrate into existing beava-website (NOT MkDocs spin-up); vertical guides DEFERRED to user-authored interactive follow-up
decisions.rationale: User directive: existing site has its own design + Pagefind search; vertical guides will be interactive (v0.1+ browser-WASM)

decisions.decision: OP_RESET gated on test_mode (3 ways to set: env var, Server::new Config, bv.App SDK kwarg)
decisions.rationale: User directive: prod servers should not be wipeable; test code should not depend on shell env vars

decisions.decision: Add fsync bench mode (acks=all per-push fsync latency)
decisions.rationale: User directive: validate durable-push p99 latency target

decisions.decision: GitHub org = beava-dev (NOT beava-io); monorepo layout for now
decisions.rationale: User directive (overrides original beava-io references in ROADMAP + docs)

next_action: /clear then /gsd-plan-phase 13.4 (engine prereq). Then sequentially: /gsd-plan-phase 13.5, /gsd-plan-phase 13.6, /gsd-plan-phase 13.7. After all 4 plan, drive /gsd-execute-phase 13.4 first (prereq), then 13.5/6/7 in parallel via /gsd-manager.
context_notes: User pushed for fully-autonomous chain (Option B) but corrected mid-stream when --auto CONTEXTs were too autonomous. Reverted at 42d431f. Did interactive discuss for all 4 phases. User engaged on every product-shaping decision. Major scope changes: 13.6 communicate-only (rejected pipeline DSL in TS/Go) + 13.7 integrate-into-existing (rejected MkDocs spin-up) + vertical guides deferred. Both decisions saved significant LOC. fsync bench mode + test_mode programmability also surfaced mid-discuss. All 4 CONTEXTs are committed; ready for plan-phase × 4 in next session.
